hero.lead: Run personal, family, shared-living, trip, project, and small-team ledgers with clear ownership, reviewable records, and data you can take with you.
hero.title: A ledger for every shared money story.

model.body: Accounting keeps users, books, accounts, categories, entries, imports, and audit events as explicit objects. That model keeps personal accounts private by default while still supporting collaborative books and source-preserving imports.
model.title: Built around ownership, not just transactions.

productShot.audit: Audit trail records who changed what.
productShot.label: Sample ledger preview

audit.body: Sensitive authentication and data changes produce sanitized audit events for later review.
audit.title: Every important action leaves evidence.

currency.body: Entries carry transaction, account, and reporting currencies with exchange-rate metadata.
currency.title: Travel and cross-border records stay explainable.

ownership.body: Books can be personal or collaborative, while accounts stay user-owned unless intentionally shared.
ownership.title: Your accounts remain yours.

auth.body: Email/password, TOTP, passkeys, Turnstile, and optional external SSO are surfaced from runtime configuration.
auth.title: Auth that fits the deployment

imports.body: Wacai imports stage a preview first, preserve raw source context, and require an explicit commit.
imports.title: Imports are reviewed before write

portable.body: The app is designed around documented JSON APIs and persistence boundaries instead of a single hidden database assumption.
portable.title: Data ownership stays visible

trust.title: Trust is expressed in the workflow.

personal.body: Track accounts, categories, income, expenses, and reports without forcing every record into a shared workspace.
personal.title: Personal finance

shared.body: Use member roles and creator-aware edit rules for households, roommates, projects, and small teams.
shared.title: Shared books

workflow.title: One system for different money contexts.

travel.body: Keep multi-currency entries, reimbursements, and source details together when a trip or project gets messy.
travel.title: Trips and reimbursements
